flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Trident Technical College fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (8.9% → 7.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Trident Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Trident Technical College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (8.8k → 10.5k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Trident Technical College fell 20% between 2017 and 2020 ($16.3k → $13.0k).
